name: Faxanadu
description: Faxanadu is a side-scrolling action RPG set in a world connected by a massive World Tree. The player controls a nameless warrior returning to his Elven hometown after a long journey, only to find it corrupted by a spreading evil. The hero must ascend the World Tree, battling monsters, collecting keys, and upgrading equipment to uncover the source of the corruption and restore peace to his land. The game features platforming challenges with varying jump heights, the use of magic spells and projectile weapons, and the accumulation of gold to purchase better armor, weapons, and items from merchants found in towns along the way. The player progresses through interconnected levels, exploring towns, forests, caves, and fortresses, each with unique enemies and environmental hazards. Key elements include acquiring and using keys to unlock doors, solving simple puzzles to progress, and defeating powerful bosses at the end of each major area. The world has verticality; the hero can move up and down through interconnected screens of buildings and trees. The player gains experience points from defeating enemies, which eventually leads to leveling up and improving the hero's stats.

controls.arrow_up: Move up (climb ladders or enter doors)
